_output_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — target filesystem path for the marshalled artifact.

_phase_status.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — workflow state (drives C4 requirements-table branch).

field_name.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Zod field path emitted in this column.

header_text.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — text printed in the header row.

width.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — preferred column width in Excel units.

type_hint.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Excel cell-type hint for the marshaller.

required.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — whether marshaller should error on null.

items.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — single column-layout instruction (first-class per C5).

_columns_plan.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — optional layout instructions (first-class per C5).

field_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — dotted path within the phase schema (e.g., "rows[].math_derivation").

introduced_in.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — schema semver where this field was added.

rationale.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — reviewer-facing reason the insertion was made.

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — KB file that motivated the insertion, if any.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — methodology insertion (first-class per C5).

_insertions.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — optional methodology insertions applied to this phase (first-class per C5).

phase_number.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — methodology phase number (0-12) per plan §4.5.

phase_slug.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — URL-safe slug (e.g., "requirements-table"). Also the xlsx sheet slug.

phase_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — human-facing phase title (e.g., "Phase 6 — Extract Requirements Table").

schema_version.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — Zod schema semver (e.g., "1.0.0") for drift-detection.

project_id.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — parent project id; keys workbook + PDF filename.

project_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — project display name; rendered at top and used as xlsx workbook title.

author.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — emitting agent or human reviewer identifier.

generator.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — tool that produced this artifact (e.g., "product-helper@0.1.0").

revision.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — monotonic revision counter per (project, phase).

object_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Entities — stable unique id for the form entity.

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Entities — noun phrase naming the entity (Box 4.2 — no verbs).

decomposition_level.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Entities — 0 = system, 1 = principal elements, 2+ = lower decompositions.

parent_entity_id.description: x-ui-surface=internal:tree-render — parent form_entity.object_id; null for Level-0 only.

attributes.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Attributes — Crawley Box 4.2: attributes with optional state enumerations.

target_entity_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Formal Relationships — id of target form_entity at same or adjacent decomposition_level.

kind.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Formal Relationships — Crawley Ch 4 §4.5 three-tier taxonomy flattened to 8 values.

label.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Formal Relationships — lowercase noun-phrase naming the relationship.

is_physical.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Dualism — true for physical-form relationships, false for purely informational (Box 4.7).

artifact.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — artifact identifier within the phase (e.g., "UC03.R02", "PC-01").

relationship.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — kind of link to the source artifact.

note.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — reviewer-facing context for the link.

crawley_glossary_ref.description: x-ui-surface=internal:provenance — pointer back to GLOSSARY-crawley when useful.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Formal Relationships — one edge in the form-entity graph.

formal_relationships.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Formal Relationships — edges to other form_entity objects.

is_physical.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Dualism — true = physical embodiment, false = informational. ≥1 true required per Box 4.7.

decomposability.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Decomposability — Crawley Ch 2 line 741–745 classification.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Entities — a single object in the form of the system (Crawley Box 4.2).

form_entities.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Entities — all form entities at all decomposition levels.

formal_relationship_ref.description: x-ui-surface=internal:provenance — id of the formal_relationship crossing the boundary (Box 4.4).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Interfaces — a formal relationship that crosses the system boundary.

role.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Whole Product System — why this accompanying system is essential to value delivery (Q 4d).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Whole Product System — Crawley §4.6 accompanying system.

accompanying_systems.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Whole Product System — Q 4d accompanying systems.

establishes.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Use Context — which of three roles Crawley §4.6 names for use-context entities.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Use Context — Crawley §4.6 use-context entity.

use_context_entities.description: x-ui-surface=section:Form Taxonomy > Use Context — Q 4f non-essential context entities.

artifact.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — artifact identifier within the phase (e.g., "UC03.R02", "PC-01").

relationship.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — kind of link to the source artifact.

note.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — reviewer-facing context for the link.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — cross-phase reference (also_appears_in / source_ucbd unified per C11).

description: x-ui-surface=page-header — M5 Phase 1: form taxonomy per Crawley Ch 4.
title: Phase1FormTaxonomy
